name: Wonderslim"homemade" Version
recipeInstructions:
1. Cover the prunes with water and bring to a boil.
2. Cool the mixture.
3. Blend the prunes, water, lecithin, and citric acid until smooth.
4. Pour into a clean quart jar and refrigerate. This should keep for up to 30 days.
5. Can be frozen.
Use as a fat and egg substitute for cooking, baking, and salad dressings. According to the directions on the jar of the commercial Wonderslim, 1/4 cup of WonderSlim replaces 1/2 cup of butter, oil, or margarine. Personally, I use whatever seems to make my recipe look and/or "feel" right.
